top_signals.title: Asia Stocks Steady as Chip Selloff Eases, Oil Down: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks held three days of losses as traders stayed cautious ahead of megacap tech earnings this week. Oil slipped from its highest close since mid-June as an escalation in Middle East hostilities rekindled worries about inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
top_signals.summary: The decision keeps the administration’s chief crypto policy negotiator in place during what could be a decisive few weeks for the CLARITY Act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
